title: Impact of mydriasis in fluorescence lifetime imaging ophthalmoscopy.
author: Sadda SR Borrelli E Fan W Ebraheem A Marion KM Kwon S
content: S-EPMC6310355 PMC6310355 Impact of mydriasis in fluorescence lifetime imaging ophthalmoscopy. Fluorescence lifetime imaging ophthalmoscopy (FLIO) is a novel technique that measures in vivo autofluorescence intensity decay over time of endogenous fluorophores in the retina. The Heidelberg
